text: The department shall implement its duties under this chapter in the manner that provides the greatest convenience to the public.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.002 — Convenience to Public

The department shall implement its duties under this chapter in the manner that provides the greatest convenience to the public.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department shall implement its duties under this chapter in the manner that provides the greatest convenience to the public.
